university.name: Angeles University Foundation
university.description: Angeles University Foundation (AUF) is a premier Catholic university in Central Luzon committed to academic excellence, Catholic values, and community service.
university.address: MacArthur Highway, Angeles City, Pampanga, Philippines 2009
university.vision: Inspired by the teachings and tradition of the Catholic Church, the Angeles University Foundation envisions to emerge as a Center of excellence in instruction, research, and community extension services in the region and in the global community.
university.mission: To realize its vision, the University is committed to the Total development of man for God and Humanity.
